hero.title: Crafting Digital Excellence With AI & ML Innovation
hero.subtitle: Transforming visionary concepts into extraordinary digital experiences through cutting-edge AI technology, machine learning pipelines, and robust full-stack development.

about.heading: AI & ML Specialist & Creative Developer
description: I am an AI / ML Engineer and Full-Stack Developer with expertise in building end-to-end machine learning pipelines, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, NLP solutions, and web applications.

My passion lies in bridging the gap between innovative artificial intelligence research and real-world production-ready products. I specialize in combining modern frontend designs with scalable AI backends to create intelligent systems that solve actual business challenges.

services.title: Machine Learning Pipelines
services.description: Building and deploying end-to-end ML pipelines including preprocessing, feature engineering, model training, evaluation, and production deployment.

services.title: RAG Systems & LLMs
services.description: Developing context-aware question answering systems and chatbots using LangChain, vector databases (FAISS, ChromaDB), and advanced LLMs like Gemini.

services.title: Natural Language Processing
services.description: Implementing tokenization, stopword removal, stemming, TF-IDF feature extraction, and classification models for text data.

services.title: Full-Stack Web Apps
services.description: Creating robust, responsive web applications integrated with AI backends using Flask, Next.js, and modern styling solutions.

services.title: AI Chatbots & Integrations
services.description: Engineering production-ready conversational agents and integrating them into messaging platforms like WhatsApp via Twilio APIs.

services.title: Chrome Extensions
services.description: Building AI-powered browser extensions that process webpage content and leverage cloud LLMs for on-page intelligence.

portfolio.title: SMS Spam Classifier Web App
portfolio.description: Built and deployed an end-to-end machine learning web app that classifies SMS messages as spam or ham in real time. Implemented NLP preprocessing (tokenization, stopword removal, stemming) and TF-IDF feature extraction. Trained a Multinomial Naive Bayes model achieving 97% accuracy and perfect precision. Deployed via Flask and Render.

portfolio.title: RAG-Based YouTube Assistant
portfolio.description: Developed a Chrome extension using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to enable context-aware Q&A from webpage content. Designed a pipeline with LangChain for document processing, embeddings, and FAISS-based semantic search. Integrated Gemini APIs to generate accurate, low-hallucination responses.

portfolio.title: RAG-Powered WhatsApp Chatbot
portfolio.description: Engineered a production-ready RAG chatbot that processes multi-format data (PDFs, Excel, text) into a searchable knowledge base. Implemented semantic retrieval with ChromaDB, embeddings, and intent detection for accurate responses. Deployed via Twilio and Render.

portfolio.title: Movie Recommendation System
portfolio.description: Built a content-based recommendation system that suggests movies using TF-IDF and cosine similarity on metadata. Implemented data preprocessing and feature engineering with Pandas and Scikit-learn. Designed a scalable logic to personalize recommendations.

testimonials.author: A. Rahman
testimonials.text: Ans delivered a highly accurate model and integrated it into our web systems flawlessly. His knowledge in NLP and machine learning pipelines is exceptional.

testimonials.author: S. Khan
testimonials.text: The Chrome extension Ans built using FAISS and LangChain completely revolutionized how our team summarizes browser content. Extremely responsive developer!

testimonials.author: M. Bilal
testimonials.text: Ans built a robust WhatsApp chatbot that retrieves facts directly from PDF/Excel records. Brilliant execution, very clean codebase, and Twilio setup.
